texto: In our family histories, the frontier between fact and fiction is vague, especially in the record of events that took place before we were born, or when we were too young to record them accurately; there are few maps to these remote regions, and only the occasional sign to guide the explorer.
explicacao: Citação de Adam Sisman sobre temas ligados a familia. “In our family histories, the frontier between fact and fiction is vague, especially in the record…” articula familia, family-history, memory em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como memory.

frase_original: In our family histories, the frontier between fact and fiction is vague, especially in the record of events that took place before we were born, or when we were too young to record them accurately; there are few maps to these remote regions, and only the occasional sign to guide the explorer.
